warnings: onboarding methodology is simulation evidence, not G5 product-GA closure evidence
ops lifecycle is simulation evidence, not G5 product-ops closure evidence
Phase 4 proxy gate passed using simulation artifacts over two local H100 logical hosts; formal G4 T4 validation remains deferred.

decision: Use two local H100 GPUs as logical hosts for the current Phase 5 productization/GA proxy gate; defer formal Sponsor G5 validation.

deferred_requirements.reason: current evidence validates productization contracts and docs, not a signed release artifact
onboarding paths are machine-validated but have not been completed by a fresh operator
current benchmark ledger is a measured fixture record; gate-grade lab-reference benchmark remains future work
lifecycle workflow is simulated over logical hosts and not wired to a production deployment
G5 requires Sponsor review after install, operate, upgrade, and serve evidence is attached

evidence_checks.evidence: cluster.yaml, model.yaml, placement.json, auth, plan integrity, and serving endpoint are represented
evidence_checks.name: operator-ux-configs

evidence_checks.evidence: deploy, drain, upgrade, restart, rollback, and node replacement are audited with zero dropped in-flight requests
evidence_checks.name: upgrade-drain-rollback-node-replace

evidence_checks.evidence: operator, developer, benchmark-owner, reviewer, required docs, and glossary are present for proxy handoff
evidence_checks.name: onboarding-and-glossary

evidence_checks.evidence: benchmark methodology defines gate mapping and required inputs; ledger contains measured records
evidence_checks.name: benchmark-methodology-of-record

evidence_checks.evidence: runbook defines operator UX, lifecycle, node replacement, onboarding, benchmark, and Sponsor review evidence collection
evidence_checks.name: g5-runbook-defined

evidence_checks.evidence: selected local H100 devices and logical hosts are recorded for productization proxy scope
evidence_checks.name: two-h100-proxy-scope

evidence_checks.evidence: formal_g5_passed remains false until installable product, benchmark-of-record, and Sponsor GA evidence are attached
evidence_checks.name: no-formal-g5-overclaim

proxy_hardware.note: Selected local H100 devices stand in for separate logical hosts during productization proxy validation.

runbook.formal_gate_rule: G5 can pass only with installable product evidence, operator acceptance, benchmark-of-record evidence, and Sponsor GA approval; two-H100 local proxy evidence may pass only the current development proxy gate.
runbook.proxy_development_scope: two local H100 GPUs may stand in for two logical hosts until formal product, lab, and Sponsor evidence is available
required_artifacts: cluster.yaml, model.yaml, and placement.json operator configs
fornax doctor preflight bundle or equivalent diagnostics
onboarding package with glossary and benchmark methodology

scenarios.goal: prove the operator can prepare and inspect cluster, model, and placement artifacts
pass_criteria: cluster.yaml, model.yaml, and placement.json are documented
doctor exits cleanly or reports only acknowledged evidence-tier warnings
operator config validation reports at least two nodes and a serving endpoint
setup: prepare cluster.yaml, model.yaml, and placement.json from the operator package
keep plan-integrity and auth requirements enabled
write a preflight bundle before lab deployment or Sponsor review

scenarios.goal: prove lifecycle actions are repeatable, audited, and drain before mutation
setup: run deploy, upgrade, restart, and rollback actions with request accounting enabled
preserve event order and active version history

scenarios.goal: prove replacement preserves identity, placement, and cleanup invariants
pass_criteria: removed node is no longer active
setup: drain the old node before removal
admit a replacement node with managed identity
verify traffic restoration and final active-node state

scenarios.goal: prove operator, developer, benchmark-owner, and reviewer tracks are complete enough for proxy handoff
setup: publish quickstart, operator runbook, developer workflow, benchmark methodology, and glossary
map each track to first-run commands, success evidence, and escalation paths
preserve simulation warnings until formal GA evidence exists

evidence_commands: python3 -m fornax benchmark --plan placement.json --mode tiny-moe-or-expert-mlp --out benchmark.json
scenarios.goal: prove benchmark methodology requires commands, traces, versions, correctness, environment, logs, and ledger records
pass_criteria: ledger contains at least one measured record
required benchmark methodology inputs are defined
lab-reference boundary remains explicit for formal G5
setup: capture benchmark commands and raw logs
attach correctness artifacts before throughput claims
append each measured run to ledger.jsonl

scenarios.goal: package install, operate, upgrade, serve, and benchmark evidence for Sponsor G5 decision
pass_criteria: phase5_proxy_passed may be true only for the local proxy gate
formal_g5_passed remains false until Sponsor accepts real GA evidence
all deferred requirements are visible in the packet
setup: attach prior G4 proxy or formal packet
attach productization runbook, onboarding package, lifecycle evidence, and benchmark ledger
record which formal GA requirements remain deferred

runbook.scope: operator UX, lifecycle, onboarding, benchmark methodology, and Sponsor GA evidence packaging
runbook.title: G5 Productization and GA Runbook
